JUDGE KAI TAMARA HARE (JUDGE PRO TEM) REPORTER JOHN LEWIS 3:15PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLTF. W/ BRENDA CRUZ KEITH, DEFT'S IN PRO PER APPEARING WITH INTERPRETER JOSE CANAVERAL. MATTER SETTLED. TERMS READ INTO RECORD. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVILA, ENRIQUE DAVILA, LUZ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 270 TURK ST. #409, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL JUN-07-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT'S WAIVE SEC DEP, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT, EACH PARTY BEARS THEIR OWN COSTS, JUDGMENT TO BE SET ASIDE UPON VACATING OF PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION BY 6/7/94
